title: Windows cmd /c filesystem launcher with a broad path is BLOCK

origin.description: Public documentation config from modelcontextprotocol/servers (src/filesystem/README.md (Windows cmd /c)). Content verbatim; only normalized to a valid JSON root. Upstream placeholders preserved.

humanExpectation.rationale: Launching the server through cmd is a shell entrypoint (arbitrary execution), and the broad home-anchored Desktop path compounds it — two independent blocking surfaces.
knownLimitations: The cmd shell could run anything; the static value shows only the documented npx invocation.
